prompt: Can you make your object SPIN? Use the rotation button to turn it!
Try rotating it — round and round!
feedback: It's turning! Round and round like a wheel.

prompt: Keep turning — can you turn it all the way round?
A full circle — can you rotate it all the way?
feedback: Right round — like a spinning top!

prompt: Now try the other way — can you turn it back?
feedback: The other way! You can spin it both ways.
